<p class="key-answer" data-question="Tadalafil 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Tadalafil</strong> 目前有 <strong>30 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Tadalafil 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Talmanco is indicated in adults for the treatment of pulmonary arterial hypertension (PAH) classified as WHO functional class II and III, to improve exercise capacity. Efficacy has been shown in...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>Ambras type hypertrichosis universalis congenita（100.0%）</li>
<li>hypertrichosis (disease)（100.0%）</li>
<li>malformation syndrome with odontal and/or periodontal component（100.0%）</li>
<li>syndrome with a Dandy-Walker malformation as major feature（100.0%）</li>
<li>isolated genetic hair shaft abnormality（100.0%）</li>
<li>benign prostatic hyperplasia (disease)（100.0%）</li>
<li>familial isolated trichomegaly（99.7%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension（99.4%）</li>
<li>kyphoscoliotic heart disease（99.4%）</li>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（99.1%）</li>
<li>migraine disorder（98.9%）</li>
<li>hypotrichosis simplex of the scalp（98.7%）</li>
<li>Raynaud disease（98.6%）</li>
<li>congenital hypotrichosis milia（98.6%）</li>
<li>alopecia（98.3%）</li>
<li>diffuse alopecia areata（98.1%）</li>
<li>genetic alopecia（98.0%）</li>
<li>familial clubfoot due to 17q23.1q23.2 microduplication（97.7%）</li>
<li>obsolete patella aplasia, coxa vara, and tarsal synostosis（97.6%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension, primary, autosomal recessive（97.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
